title: Popped Out Plants By Hurkledurkle
body:
Makes all plants have 3d models and random rotation as a side feature :P

Whats done so far:

Red mushroom,
Brown mushroom,
Dandelion,
Alium,
Red tulip,
Pink tulip,
Torchflower,
All stages of pitcherplant,
Open and closed eyeblossom,
Wither rose,
Fern,
Crimson and warped fungus

MAIJOR W.I.P

 

You can join my discord to provide feedback and take part in voting for what is to come next!!!
https://discord.gg/4dg5TP3eCn
